requirement_topic.en: EMC Testing to ETSI / IEC Standards (TRA Type Approval Requirement)
requirement_topic.zh: ETSI/IEC标准的EMC测试（TRA型号认证要求）
requirement_topic.zht: ETSI/IEC標準的EMC測試（TRA型號認證要求）

summary.en: TRA type approval requires EMC test reports from an accredited laboratory demonstrating conformance with ETSI or IEC EMC standards applicable to the device category. For Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices, ETSI EN 301 489-1 (common EMC requirements) and ETSI EN 301 489-17 (specific for wideband data/WLAN/BT) are the primary referenced standards. For other radio categories (LoRa/SRD, cellular), the corresponding ETSI EN 301 489 sub-part applies. EMC test evidence is submitted as part of the TRA type approval application dossier. Chinese GB EMC standards (GB/T 9254, GB 17625) are not accepted by TRA.
summary.zh: TRA型号认证要求提供由经认可实验室出具的EMC测试报告，证明符合适用于该设备类别的ETSI或IEC EMC标准。对于Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备，主要参考标准为ETSI EN 301 489-1（通用EMC要求）和ETSI EN 301 489-17（宽带数据/WLAN/BT专项）。其他无线类别（LoRa/SRD、蜂窝）则适用相应的ETSI EN 301 489子部分。EMC测试证据作为TRA型号认证申请文件的一部分提交。中国GB EMC标准（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被TRA接受。
summary.zht: TRA型號認證要求提供由經認可實驗室出具的EMC測試報告，證明符合適用於該設備類別的ETSI或IEC EMC標準。對於Wi-Fi和藍牙設備，主要參考標準為ETSI EN 301 489-1（通用EMC要求）和ETSI EN 301 489-17（寬頻資料/WLAN/BT專項）。其他無線類別（LoRa/SRD、蜂窩）則適用相應的ETSI EN 301 489子部分。EMC測試證據作為TRA型號認證申請文件的一部分提交。中國GB EMC標準（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被TRA接受。

standards_or_laws: ETSI EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 (Common EMC requirements for radio equipment)
ETSI EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 (EMC for wideband data and HIPERLAN)

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for IT and radio equipment is governed by GB/T 9254 (conducted and radiated emissions for ISM/IT equipment) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions). SRRC type approval includes radio parameter measurements but does not encompass the full ETSI EN 301 489 EMC test scope. CCC certification includes EMC under GB/T 9254 for in-scope products.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT及无线电设备的EMC合规依据GB/T 9254（ISM/IT设备的传导和辐射发射）和GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射）执行。SRRC型号认证包含无线电参数测量，但不涵盖完整的ETSI EN 301 489 EMC测试范围。CCC认证对列入目录的产品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT及無線電設備的EMC合規依據GB/T 9254（ISM/IT設備的傳導和輻射發射）和GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射）執行。SRRC型號認證包含無線電參數測量，但不涵蓋完整的ETSI EN 301 489 EMC測試範圍。CCC認證對列入目錄的產品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval (radio parameter testing, not full EMC)

gap.en: TRA requires EMC evidence to ETSI EN 301 489 series standards, which differ in test methods, limits, and frequency ranges from Chinese GB/T 9254. A new EMC test campaign at a TRA-accepted accredited lab is required. Existing SRRC and CCC EMC reports to GB standards cannot be reused for TRA. The ETSI EN 301 489 framework also covers immunity testing (IEC 61000-4 series) which is not part of the SRRC scope.
gap.zh: TRA要求提供符合ETSI EN 301 489系列标准的EMC证据，该系列在测试方法、限值和频率范围上均与中国GB/T 9254有所不同。须在TRA认可的经认可实验室进行新的EMC测试。现有的依据GB标准出具的SRRC和CCC EMC报告不能用于TRA。ETSI EN 301 489框架还涵盖抗扰度测试（IEC 61000-4系列），该部分不在SRRC范围之内。
gap.zht: TRA要求提供符合ETSI EN 301 489系列標準的EMC證據，該系列在測試方法、限值和頻率範圍上均與中國GB/T 9254有所不同。須在TRA認可的經認可實驗室進行新的EMC測試。現有的依據GB標準出具的SRRC和CCC EMC報告不能用於TRA。ETSI EN 301 489框架還涵蓋抗擾度測試（IEC 61000-4系列），該部分不在SRRC範圍之內。

source.publisher: TRA — Telecommunications and Digital Government Regulatory Authority (UAE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC testing to ETSI EN 301 489 series at a TRA-accepted accredited laboratory is required as part of TRA type approval. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC EMC test reports are not accepted by TRA.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在TRA认可的经认可实验室按ETSI EN 301 489系列进行EMC测试，是TRA型号认证的必要组成部分。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC测试报告不被TRA接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在TRA認可的經認可實驗室按ETSI EN 301 489系列進行EMC測試，是TRA型號認證的必要組成部分。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC測試報告不被TRA接受。

requirement_topic.en: ESMA Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS) — Regulated Product Categories
requirement_topic.zh: ESMA阿联酋合规评估方案（ECAS）— 受监管产品类别
requirement_topic.zht: ESMA阿聯酋合規評估方案（ECAS）— 受監管產品類別

summary.en: ESMA (Emirates Authority for Standardization and Metrology) administers the Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS) under Cabinet Decision No. 38 of 2016 on Product Safety. Regulated electrical and electronic consumer products falling under UAE.S or UAE.SE technical standard series must bear the ECAS Emirates conformity mark before they can be sold in the UAE. Wireless IoT devices and consumer electronics with mains-connected power supplies may fall within ESMA's regulated product scope in addition to TRA type approval. The ECAS mark is separate from and additive to the TRA ITSEC mark; both may be required simultaneously for mains-powered wireless consumer products.
summary.zh: ESMA（阿联酋标准化与计量局）依据《2016年第38号内阁关于产品安全的决议》管理阿联酋合规评估方案（ECAS）。属于UAE.S或UAE.SE技术标准系列的受监管电气和电子消费品须在阿联酋销售前加贴ECAS阿联酋合规标志。无线物联网设备及带市电电源的消费电子产品，除TRA型号认证外还可能纳入ESMA受监管产品范围。ECAS标志与TRA ITSEC标志相互独立且可叠加；对于市电供电的无线消费产品，两者可能同时要求。
summary.zht: ESMA（阿聯酋標準化與計量局）依據《2016年第38號內閣關於產品安全的決議》管理阿聯酋合規評估方案（ECAS）。屬於UAE.S或UAE.SE技術標準系列的受監管電氣和電子消費品須在阿聯酋銷售前加貼ECAS阿聯酋合規標誌。無線物聯網設備及帶市電電源的消費電子產品，除TRA型號認證外還可能納入ESMA受監管產品範圍。ECAS標誌與TRA ITSEC標誌相互獨立且可疊加；對於市電供電的無線消費產品，兩者可能同時要求。

standards_or_laws: Cabinet Decision No. 38 of 2016 on Product Safety (UAE)

summary.en: In China, CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is the mandatory product safety and EMC scheme for products listed in the CCC compulsory catalogue, administered by CNCA. GB 4943.1 covers IT and AV equipment safety; GB/T 9254 covers EMC emissions. CCC mark must appear on in-scope products before sale in China.
summary.zh: 在中国，CCC（中国强制认证）是针对CCC强制目录内产品的强制性产品安全与EMC方案，由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理。GB 4943.1涵盖IT及音视频设备安全；GB/T 9254涵盖EMC发射。列入目录的产品须在中国销售前标注CCC标志。
summary.zht: 在中國，CCC（中國強制認證）是針對CCC強制目錄內產品的強制性產品安全與EMC方案，由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理。GB 4943.1涵蓋IT及音視頻設備安全；GB/T 9254涵蓋EMC發射。列入目錄的產品須在中國銷售前標注CCC標誌。

gap.en: CCC certification is not recognised in UAE by ESMA or TRA. Where a wireless device falls within the ESMA regulated product scope, a separate ECAS assessment against UAE.S technical standards is required. Importers should verify whether their specific product category is listed under the current ESMA regulated product schedule before shipment.
gap.zh: CCC认证不被ESMA或TRA承认。若无线设备属于ESMA受监管产品范围，须依据UAE.S技术标准另行进行ECAS评估。进口商在发货前应核验其具体产品类别是否列于当前ESMA受监管产品清单。
gap.zht: CCC認證不被ESMA或TRA承認。若無線設備屬於ESMA受監管產品範圍，須依據UAE.S技術標準另行進行ECAS評估。進口商在發貨前應核驗其具體產品類別是否列於當前ESMA受監管產品清單。

source.publisher: ESMA — Emirates Authority for Standardization and Metrology (UAE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ESMA ECAS conformity marking is mandatory for regulated product categories under UAE.S standards and may apply to mains-powered wireless consumer devices in addition to TRA type approval. CCC certification is not accepted. Verify the current ESMA regulated product schedule for your specific device category.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ESMA ECAS合规标志对UAE.S标准下的受监管产品类别为强制要求，市电供电的无线消费设备在TRA型号认证之外可能还须遵守。CCC认证不被接受。请核验您具体设备类别的当前ESMA受监管产品清单。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ESMA ECAS合規標誌對UAE.S標準下的受監管產品類別為強制要求，市電供電的無線消費設備在TRA型號認證之外可能還須遵守。CCC認證不被接受。請核驗您具體設備類別的當前ESMA受監管產品清單。
